# rig

> Opinionated Windows 11 Pro workstation setup scripts for data science — single user account, soft work/personal boundaries, conda environments for isolation.

This repo contains standalone PowerShell and Bash scripts to configure a fresh Windows 11 Pro machine for data science work. Scripts prompt for all personal info at runtime — nothing is hardcoded. No orchestrator; run in suggested order or pick what you need.

Target machine: Windows 11 Pro, no dedicated GPU, WSL 2 + Ubuntu for Linux tooling.

## Scripts (suggested run order)

- [01-privacy.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/01-privacy.ps1): Disable Windows telemetry, advertising ID, activity tracking, location, speech recognition. Requires admin PowerShell.
- [02-profile.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/02-profile.ps1): Create PowerShell profile with env vars ($PERSONAL_PROJECTS, $WORK_DIR), power plan shortcuts, Jupyter Lab alias. All values prompted.
- [03-miniforge.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/03-miniforge.ps1): Silent install of Miniforge (conda-forge + mamba). Handles existing install removal. No admin required.
- [04-ssh.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/04-ssh.ps1): Fix SSH key permissions (Windows ACLs) and print fingerprints for verification. Keys must be manually copied first.
- [05-folders.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/05-folders.ps1): Create personal projects folder and work symlink to OneDrive path. Restore Jupyter Lab settings. Depends on 02-profile.
- [06-git.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/06-git.ps1): Install git via winget, configure identity with conditional includes (personal default, work override by path). Depends on 02-profile.
- [07-wsl.sh](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/07-wsl.sh): WSL Ubuntu setup — apt-fast, AWS CLI, nvm + Node.js + CDK, Docker Engine (no Docker Desktop), SSH key copy from Windows, browser integration, git config (conditional work/personal identity, autocrlf=input). Depends on 04-ssh.
- [08-bloatware.ps1](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/08-bloatware.ps1): Remove pre-installed bloatware — McAfee, Bing apps, Clipchamp, ASUS widgets, Solitaire, Phone Link, etc. Each entry commented with removal rationale. Admin recommended.

## Config

- [base.yaml](https://github.com/giordafrancis/rig/blob/main/base.yaml): Conda environment spec — numpy, pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch (CPU), JupyterLab, nbdev, and more. Install with `conda env update -n base --file base.yaml`.
